task_completion.description: Verify KLAX is set as the departure point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight planning application shows 'KLAX' entered in the departure field or as the first waypoint in the route list.

task_completion.description: Verify SLI is added as an intermediate waypoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight planning application shows 'SLI' added as a waypoint in the route list.

task_completion.description: Verify KSAN is set as the destination point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight planning application shows 'KSAN' entered in the destination field or as the final waypoint in the route list.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact route sequence is KLAX -> SLI -> KSAN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route list or map sequence visually confirms the exact order: KLAX followed by SLI, followed by KSAN, with no other waypoints interrupting this sequence.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight plan is exported with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, export window, or file manager displays the filename 'amended_clearance' being saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the exported file format is GPX.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog or export window shows the file type selected as GPX, or the filename explicitly includes the '.gpx' extension (e.g., 'amended_clearance.gpx').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical flight planning application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a dedicated flight planning GUI (e.g., Little Navmap or similar), not just a terminal window or basic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the file was exported using the application's features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export must be performed using the application's built-in 'Export' or 'Save As' menu options, rather than the agent manually writing GPX XML markup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application to create the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen opening a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type out the expected route sequence or GPX file contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required route sequence is strictly KLAX -> SLI -> KSAN. KLAX (Los Angeles International) is at approx 33.94N, -118.40W. SLI (Seal Beach VORTAC) is at approx 33.78N, -118.05W. KSAN (San Diego International) is at approx 32.73N, -117.19W. The final output must be a GPX format file named 'amended_clearance' (or 'amended_clearance.gpx').
